description: A paginated list of CMS pages.
name: CollectionResponsePage

items.description: A HubSpot CMS page (site page or landing page).

id.description: The unique identifier for the page.

name.description: The internal name of the page.

htmlTitle.description: The HTML title tag content for the page.

slug.description: The URL slug for the page.

state.description: The current publish state of the page.

currentState.description: The current display state of the page.

publishDate.description: The date and time the page was or will be published.

url.description: The full URL of the published page.

domain.description: The domain the page is hosted on.

language.description: The language code for the page content.

templatePath.description: The path to the template used by the page.

createdAt.description: The date and time the page was created.

updatedAt.description: The date and time the page was last updated.

archived.description: Whether the page has been archived.
